name: Aetheolaris: A system 59 ly away
description:
Aetheolaris, a solar system made by me. You can call it Solvaeron too.

This system has two suns: Aetheron—a red giant—and Solvaris—a yellow main sequence star.

This system also has other planets, such as Pyroxis (the closest) Vitralis & Crythea (double orbiting planets), Nyvara, Aureth and Zephyron(gas dwarf). There seems to be more, but that's everything humans had found about this system.

You teleport to the Earthlike planet called Aureth after going to sleep. It has a moon, which instead of fleeing, is slowly coming closer every Aureth year.

This planet is 0.95x the size of Earth, with an average temperature of 8°C or 54.4°F, colder than Earth's 15°C or 59°F.

The days in there last 52 hours, the years last 3.7 Earth years. The days look a bit more reddish because of Aetheron.

This planet has life similar to Earth, but not animals and/or humanoid figures. Just... plants.

It's just you and nobody else. Good luck.
creator: termos_14
